panels.description: The time taken after receiving the raw block from DA through State Transition Function and committing to the database

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "sov-rollup")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_runner_times_us" and r._field != "da_height"
  )

if agg_func == "raw" then
  data
else if agg_func == "median" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: median)
else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)
else if agg_func == "p90" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))
else if agg_func == "p99" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column))
else
  data

panels.title: Runner loop times

panels.description:
How much time does it take to process slot, split by following stages:

1. blob_selection
2. begin_hooks
3. blobs_processing
4. end_hooks
5. finalization

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "sov-rollup")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_slot_execution_time_us" and
    r._field != "da_height" and r._field != "rollup_height"
  )

if agg_func == "raw" then
  data
else if agg_func == "median" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: median)
else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)
else if agg_func == "p90" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))
else if agg_func == "p99" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column))
else
  data

panels.title: Sync Distance

panels.description: Distance from synced DA height to the head DA height.

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "sov-rollup")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_runner_da" and
    r._field == "da_height"
  )
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)

if agg_func == "raw" then
  data
else if agg_func == "median" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: median)
else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)
else if agg_func == "p90" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))
else if agg_func == "p99" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.99, column: column))
else
  data

panels.title: Batches Processed

targets.query:
agg_func = "${agg_func}"

data = from(bucket: "sov-rollup")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "sov_rollup_runner_counts" and r._field == "batches_c"
  )
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r._value)}))


if agg_func == "raw" then
   data |> cumulativeSum()
else
   data 
    |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: sum)
    |> cumulativeSum()

agg_func = "${agg_func}"

else if agg_func == "median" then

else if agg_func == "mean" then
  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: mean)

  data |> aggregateWindow(every: ${agg_interval}, fn: (column, tables=<-) =>  tables |> quantile(q: 0.90, column: column))

  data

panels.title: HTTP Handler Times

list.description: Function to aggregate values. Raw means no aggregation
list.label: Aggregation function
list.name: agg_func

list.description: Interval used for aggergating values, if aggregation is specified
list.label: Aggregation Interval
list.name: agg_interval
